notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Mark Vientos out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Kyle Stowers.
